value_chain_position: Infrastructure engineering software platform layer — sells the dominant CAD/simulation tools (MicroStation, OpenRoads, OpenBuildings) for civil infrastructure (roads, bridges, utilities, rail) and increasingly digital twin platforms (iTwin) for asset lifecycle management.
relative_comps: Bentley occupies a focused niche in civil/infrastructure engineering software where ADSK has limited penetration; iTwin digital twin platform is the key growth driver but still early. 12% YoY growth and 32% FCF margin are solid for its scale; leverage at 2.2x EBITDA is notable. The robotics_automation tag is marginal — iTwin more closely supports energy_transition infrastructure builds than autonomous robotics, but the digital twin layer for infrastructure is genuinely disruptive in the construction/ops workflow.
